# Timeline

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Timeline;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Timeline { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
tags, history

## Categories
time
